items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Attempt history and scoring records', but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as offer creation and booking processes, without addressing the specific need for attempt history or scoring records. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm or identify any gaps regarding this requirement.
